name: FacetsBCBSCustSvcIdCardPhnDelete

text.value: SELECT CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_IDCARD_PHN_SK,CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.SRC_SYS_CD_SK,CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.GRP_ID,CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.SUBGRP_ID,CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.CLS_ID,CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.CLS_PLN_ID,CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.PROD_ID,CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.EFF_DT_SK,CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN_KEY,CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN_USE_CD,CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.CLS_SK,CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.CLS_PLN_SK,CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN_SK,CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.GRP_SK,CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.PROD_SK,CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.SUBGRP_SK,CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.CLS_PLN_DTL_PROD_CAT_CD_SK,CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN_USE_CD_SK,CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.TERM_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN WHERE CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN.TERM_DT_SK <= '@{pipeline().parameters.LeastTermDate}'; @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLS; CREATE TABLE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN (CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_IDCARD_PHN_SK INTEGER NOT NULL, SRC_SYS_CD_SK INTEGER NOT NULL, GRP_ID VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, SUBGRP_ID VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, CLS_ID VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, CLS_PLN_ID VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, PROD_ID VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, EFF_DT_SK CHAR(10) NOT NULL, CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN_KEY DECIMAL(11) NOT NULL, CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN_USE_CD VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK INTEGER NOT NULL, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK INTEGER NOT NULL, CLS_SK INTEGER NOT NULL, CLS_PLN_SK INTEGER NOT NULL, CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN_SK INTEGER, GRP_SK INTEGER NOT NULL, PROD_SK INTEGER NOT NULL, SUBGRP_SK INTEGER NOT NULL, CLS_PLN_DTL_PROD_CAT_CD_SK INTEGER NOT NULL, CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN_USE_CD_SK INTEGER NOT NULL, TERM_DT_SK CHAR(10) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_IDCARD_PHN_SK)); DROP TABLE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN; @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN

Description:
This job will delete/update data which are over 3 years in CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN table
